facts.what: Late package join and timeline compression.
facts.why: Unexpected tanker delay plus conservative speed profile.
facts.how: Timeline shifted by +6 min, mission still completed.
facts.narrative: Crew coordinated with package lead and re-sequenced the run with acceptable risk posture.

analysis.content: Primary factor: insufficient preplanned timeline branches. Secondary factor: delayed speed adjustment decision.

recos.doctrine: Mandate timeline branch A/B before COMAO push.
recos.organisation: Define trigger point for speed profile change.
recos.rh: Train mission commander on earlier commitment decisions.
recos.equipements: Use timeline aid page continuously, not only at checkpoints.
recos.soutien: Pre-build contingency cards by package role.

qwi.advice: Mission success with disciplined comms. Improve by deciding timeline branch earlier and rehearsing speed gates before push.
